distractors.off_target_set: Single-component bugs with linear causality; problems where no feedback loops exist; meta-questions about systems thinking
distractors.description: Items where the system behavior is linear and single-component, or where systems thinking adds no diagnostic value

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
